title: Nvidia plans NemoClaw launch, an open-source platform for AI agents
description: Nvidia is planning to launch NemoClaw, an open-source platform for AI agents, next week. The product is reportedly already beingThe post Nvidia plans NemoClaw launch, an open-source platform for AI agents appeared first on The New Stack.

title: Peter Thiel dumped Nvidia and invested $45 million into Microsoft and Apple—sending a strong signal about who will win the AI race
description: Peter Thiel quietly dumped all his Nvidia shares and bought Apple and Microsoft—a repositioning that signals doubt about AI's most celebrated chipmaker.

title: Britain Clamps Down on Speculative Grid Connections to Boost AI and Industrial Projects
description: The UK government is intensifying efforts to curb speculative applications for grid connections focusing on facilitating industrial and AI data center projects that promise economic growth and job creation The move comes after a 460 surge in connection demand leading to delays of up to 15 years for some ventures the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero announced

title: In Maine, a Democrat-led crackdown on ‘deepfake’ AI campaign ads
description: Republicans worry that the new bill is too vague and too punitive.

title: In Maine, a Democrat-led crackdown on ‘deepfake’ AI campaign ads
description: AUGUSTA, ME – JAN 29: House chair Rep. Amy Kuhn, D-Falmouth, speaks during a hearing on LD 2106 ÒAn Act to Prohibit the Disclosure of Nonpublic Records Without Proper Judicial ReviewÓ Thursday January 29, 2026 before Joint Standing Committee on Judiciary on fourth floor of Maine State House in Augusta.
